attestation: None declared in this schema version (no documents[] entry) — the online service is a self-certifying web form with no uploaded evidence; see VERIFICATION.md.
safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (gb/dvla/transfer-vehicle-to-trade). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to DVLA or any government system, and the vehicle registration number/V5C reference number above are fabricated examples, not a real vehicle record — this schema's own author confirmed (see VERIFICATION.md) that the live service rejects invented reference pairs with 'Unable to find a vehicle record'. A human (the seller) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize submission through DVLA's own channel (https://transfer-vehicle-to-trade.service.gov.uk/seller) before this notification is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
